raw_title: Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework
raw_content: As AI agents transition from simple chatbots to autonomous systems capable of managing cloud incidents, navigating complex web interfaces, and executing multi-step API workflows, a new challenge has emerged: transparency. When a human makes a mistake, we can usually trace the logic. But when an AI agent fails, perhaps by hallucinating a tool output or […] The post Systematic debugging for AI agents: Introducing the AgentRx framework appeared first on Microsoft Research.
